overview: Premium futuristic 3D cloud kitchen website for ChefZone Mandsaur — Mandsaur's first cloud kitchen. Features immersive Three.js 3D visuals, animated canvas backgrounds, glassmorphism design, floating particles, full vegetarian menu showcase, offers, reviews, gallery, and WhatsApp ordering integration.
features: Immersive Three.js 3D rotating food card visuals
Full vegetarian menu with 8 categories and placeholder food images
Animated offers, reviews carousel, and gallery with 3D hover zoom
WhatsApp floating button and order integration
Sticky navbar with mobile hamburger menu
Contact section with Google Map embed and social links
Neon glow effects and scroll-triggered animations
SEO optimized dark luxury restaurant aesthetic
